info.name: Homestay Review Sentiment Classifier
info.description: API collection for the Homestay Guest Review Sentiment Classifier backend. Covers health checks, single review analysis, batch review analysis, and validation edge cases.

response.name: 200 OK — Positive
200 OK — Negative
200 OK — Neutral
200 OK — Batch Result
200 OK — Batch from string
400 Bad Request — Invalid Input
400 Bad Request — Too Short
